# TradeXray

> Professional crypto trading platform with live markets for 500+ assets, advanced charts, futures, trading bots, copy trading and staking. Bilingual EN/AR. Paper-trading with a $10,000 virtual USDT portfolio.

TradeXray provides real-time price data sourced from Binance, TradingView-powered charts, AI-assisted price prediction, and simulated order execution so users can learn and test strategies risk-free.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of TradeXray, featured markets and platform capabilities.
- [Markets](/markets): Live prices, top gainers/losers and volume leaders for 500+ cryptocurrencies.
- [Spot Trade — BTC](/trade/BTC): Live chart, order book and trade panel for Bitcoin.
- [Futures](/futures): Perpetual crypto futures with up to 125x leverage.
- [Trading Bots](/bots): Automated Grid and DCA trading bots.
- [Copy Trading](/copy): Follow verified pro traders and mirror their strategies.
- [Earn](/earn): Stake crypto and earn passive yield.
